# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes packages, creates releases, and updates documentation. Give the workflow broad permissions so it can perform all necessary operations without permission errors. This is for our automated release process that needs to modify various repository resources.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      version:
        description: "Release version (e.g., 1.2.3). Leave empty to auto-detect via build/release scripts."
        required: false
        type: string
      prerelease:
        description: "Mark GitHub Release as prerelease"
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*"

permissions:
  actions: write
  attestations: write
  checks: write
  contents: write
  deployments: write
  id-token: write
  issues: write
  discussions: write
  packages: write
  pages: write
  pull-requests: write
  repository-projects: write
  security-events: write
  statuses: write

concurrency:
  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  CI: true
  FORCE_COLOR: "1"
  NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
  NPM_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
  PYPI_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PYPI_TOKEN }}
  GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

jobs:
  build_publish_release_docs:
    name: Build, Publish, Release, Docs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: true

      - name: Configure Git identity
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"

      - name: Determine version
        id: version
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -n "${{ inputs.version || '' }}" ]]; then
            v="${{ inputs.version }}"
          elif [[ "${GITHUB_REF_TYPE}" == "tag" ]]; then
            v="${GITHUB_REF_NAME#v}"
          else
            v=""
          fi
          echo "value=$v" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "VERSION=$v" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
          cache: "npm"

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"
          cache: "pip"

      - name: Setup Ruby (optional, for docs)
        uses: ruby/setup-ruby@v1
        with:
          ruby-version: "3.3"
          bundler-cache: true

      - name: Install dependencies (Node)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [[ -f package-lock.json ]]; then
            npm ci
          elif [[ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]]; then
            corepack enable
            pnpm i --frozen-lockfile
          elif [[ -f yarn.lock ]]; then
            corepack enable
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          else
            npm i
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies (Python)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip build twine
          if [[ -f requirements.txt ]]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi

      - name: Build packages
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if npm -s run | grep -qE '^  build'; then
            npm run build
          fi
          if [[ -f pyproject.toml || -f setup.py ]]; then
            python -m build
          fi

      - name: Run tests (if present)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if npm -s run | grep -qE '^  test'; then
            npm test
          fi
          if [[ -f pyproject.toml || -f setup.py ]]; then
            if python -c "import pytest" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
              pytest -q
            fi
          fi

      - name: Publish to npm (if configured)
        shell: bash
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -n "${NPM_TOKEN:-}" ]] && [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            if npm -s run | grep -qE '^  prepublishOnly'; then
              npm run prepublishOnly
            fi
            npm publish --access public || npm publish
          else
            echo "Skipping npm publish (NPM_TOKEN or package.json missing)."
          fi

      - name: Publish to GitHub Packages (npm) (optional)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            echo "//npm.pkg.github.com/:_authToken=${GITHUB_TOKEN}" > ~/.npmrc
            npm config set registry https://npm.pkg.github.com
            npm publish --access public || true
          fi

      - name: Publish to PyPI (if configured)
        shell: bash
        env:
          TWINE_USERNAME: __token__
          TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -n "${PYPI_TOKEN:-}" ]] && [[ -d dist ]]; then
            twine upload --non-interactive dist/* || true
          else
            echo "Skipping PyPI publish (PYPI_TOKEN or dist/ missing)."
          fi

      - name: Generate changelog (optional)
        id: changelog
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p .github/release
          if [[ -f CHANGELOG.md ]]; then
            body="$(sed -n '1,200p' CHANGELOG.md)"
          else
            body="Automated release."
          fi
          printf "%s\n" "$body" > .github/release/notes.md
          echo "path=.github/release/notes.md" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        shell: bash
        env:
          TAG: ${{ github.ref_type == 'tag' && github.ref_name || format('v{0}', steps.version.outputs.value) }}
          NAME: ${{ github.ref_type == 'tag' && github.ref_name || format('v{0}', steps.version.outputs.value) }}
          PRERELEASE: ${{ inputs.prerelease || false }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          tag="${TAG}"
          name="${NAME}"
          if [[ -z "${tag}" || "${tag}" == "v" ]]; then
            if [[ -n "${VERSION:-}" ]]; then
              tag="v${VERSION}"
              name="v${VERSION}"
            else
              tag="v0.0.0"
              name="v0.0.0"
            fi
          fi

          if ! git rev-parse -q --verify "refs/tags/${tag}" >/dev/null; then
            git tag "${tag}"
            git push origin "${tag}"
          fi

          args=(release create "${tag}" --title "${name}" --notes-file "${{ steps.changelog.outputs.path }}")
          if [[ "${PRERELEASE}" == "true" ]]; then
            args+=(--prerelease)
          fi
          gh "${args[@]}" || gh release edit "${tag}" --title "${name}" --notes-file "${{ steps.changelog.outputs.path }}"

      - name: Upload release assets (if any)
        shell: bash
        env:
          TAG: ${{ github.ref_type == 'tag' && github.ref_name || format('v{0}', steps.version.outputs.value) }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          tag="${TAG}"
          if [[ -d dist ]]; then
            gh release upload "${tag}" dist/* --clobber || true
          fi
          if [[ -d build ]]; then
            tar -czf build-artifacts.tgz build || true
            if [[ -f build-artifacts.tgz ]]; then
              gh release upload "${tag}" build-artifacts.tgz --clobber || true
            fi
          fi

      - name: Build documentation
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if npm -s run | grep -qE '^  docs'; then
            npm run docs
          elif [[ -f mkdocs.yml ]]; then
            pip install mkdocs mkdocs-material
            mkdocs build
          elif [[ -f docs/Gemfile ]]; then
            cd docs
            bundle install
            bundle exec jekyll build -d ../_site
          elif [[ -d docs ]]; then
            mkdir -p _site
            cp -R docs/* _site/ || true
          else
            mkdir -p _site
            echo "No documentation build configured." > _site/index.html
          fi

      - name: Update documentation branch (gh-pages)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -d _site ]]; then
            git fetch origin gh-pages || true
            git switch --orphan gh-pages-tmp
            git rm -rf . >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
            cp -R _site/* .
            touch .nojekyll || true
            git add -A
            git commit -m "docs: update for ${GITHUB_SHA}" || true
            git branch -M gh-pages
            git push -f origin gh-pages
            git switch - || true
          fi

      - name: Commit generated docs back to default branch (optional)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -d docs ]] && [[ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]]; then
            git add -A
            git commit -m "chore(docs): update generated documentation" || true
            git push origin HEAD:${GITHUB_REF_NAME} || true
          fi

      - name: Summary
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Release workflow completed." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "Ref: $GITHUB_REF" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "SHA: $GITHUB_SHA" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          if [[ -n "${VERSION:-}" ]]; then
            echo "Version: ${VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          fi
